question_intent: Calculate the total revenue generated from sales of titles published by Algodata Infosystems in California, considering the royalty percentages for each author.

plan.question_intent: Calculate the total revenue generated from sales of titles published by Algodata Infosystems in California, considering the royalty percentages for each author.
plan.detail_query:
SELECT leaf_1.title_id, leaf_1.title, leaf_1.price, leaf_1.qty, leaf_1.royaltyper, leaf_1.revenue
FROM (SELECT t.title_id, t.title, t.price, s.qty, ta.royaltyper, (t.price * s.qty * ta.royaltyper / 100) AS revenue
FROM titles AS t
JOIN sales AS s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN titleauthor AS ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id
JOIN publishers AS p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
WHERE (p.pub_id = 1389) AND (p.state = 'CA')) AS leaf_1

blocks.notes: This block calculates the revenue for each sale of a title published by Algodata Infosystems in California, considering the royalty percentage for each author.

build_logs.notes: This block calculates the total revenue generated from sales of titles published by Algodata Infosystems in California.

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT t.title_id, t.title, t.price, s.qty, ta.royaltyper, (t.price * s.qty * ta.royaltyper / 100) AS revenue
FROM titles AS t
JOIN sales AS s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN titleauthor AS ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id
JOIN publishers AS p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
WHERE (p.pub_id = 1389) AND (p.state = 'CA')) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM (SELECT t.title_id, t.title, t.price, s.qty, ta.royaltyper, (t.price * s.qty * ta.royaltyper / 100) AS revenue
FROM titles AS t
JOIN sales AS s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN titleauthor AS ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id
JOIN publishers AS p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
WHERE (p.pub_id = 1389) AND (p.state = 'CA')) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(revenue)
FROM (SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, t.title_id, t.title, s.qty, t.price, (s.qty * t.price) AS revenue
FROM authors AS a
JOIN titleauthor AS ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles AS t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN sales AS s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
WHERE (a.state = 'CA')) AS leaf_1

SELECT SUM(leaf_1.price * leaf_1.qty) AS total_sales_dollars
FROM (SELECT authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, titles.title, titles.price, sales.qty, sales.stor_id, stores.city, stores.state
FROM authors
JOIN titleauthor ON authors.au_id = titleauthor.au_id
JOIN titles ON titleauthor.title_id = titles.title_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
JOIN stores ON sales.stor_id = stores.stor_id
WHERE (authors.state = 'CA') AND (titles.pub_id IN (SELECT pub_id FROM publishers WHERE state = 'CA')) AND (stores.state = 'CA')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the total revenue generated from all book sales where the publisher is based in California (ID 1389), calculated as the sum of each title's price multiplied by its quantity sold and the author's royalty percentage?
